notes: pcidrv KMDF power management. MPSetPowerD0 and NICAddWakeUpPattern are internal helpers (not EVT_WDF_* registered callbacks). Scanner spinlock heuristic fires on both. NICConfigureForWakeUp appears twice in scanner output — likely a scanner extraction artifact from conditional compilation or macro; only listed once in GT.

MPSetPowerD0.label: other
MPSetPowerD0.notes: Internal helper called from NICSetPower (power management path). Not a registered EVT_WDF callback. Scanner mislabels as 'dispatch' via spinlock heuristic — false positive.

NICAddWakeUpPattern.label: other
NICAddWakeUpPattern.notes: Adds a WOL wake-up pattern. Has ASSERT(KeGetCurrentIrql() <= DISPATCH_LEVEL) — can run at either level depending on caller. Not a registered WDF callback. Scanner mislabels as 'dispatch' — false positive.

HwReadPowerPMDR.label: other
HwReadPowerPMDR.notes: Reads Power Management Data Register. Internal hardware helper.

MpClearPME_En.label: other
MpClearPME_En.notes: Clears PME enable bit in PCI config. Internal helper.

MPSetPowerLowPrivate.label: other
MPSetPowerLowPrivate.notes: Private low-power configuration helper. Not a registered callback.

MPSetPowerD0Private.label: other
MPSetPowerD0Private.notes: Private D0 power restore helper. Called from MPSetPowerD0.

HwSetWakeUpConfigure.label: other
HwSetWakeUpConfigure.notes: Configures hardware WOL registers. Internal helper.

MPSetUpFilterCB.label: other
MPSetUpFilterCB.notes: Sets up filter command block for WOL. Internal helper.

MPIssueScbPoMgmtCommand.label: other
MPIssueScbPoMgmtCommand.notes: Issues SCB power management command. Internal helper.

MPCalculateE100PatternForFilter.label: other
MPCalculateE100PatternForFilter.notes: Calculates pattern bytes for WOL filter. Internal helper.

MPCreateProgrammableFilter.label: other
MPCreateProgrammableFilter.notes: Creates a programmable WOL filter entry. Internal helper.

MPSetPowerLow.label: other
MPSetPowerLow.notes: Transitions adapter to low-power state. Internal helper.

MPAreTwoPatternsEqual.label: other
MPAreTwoPatternsEqual.notes: Compares two WOL patterns. Pure helper.

NICExtractPMInfoFromPciSpace.label: other
NICExtractPMInfoFromPciSpace.notes: Reads PM capability from PCI config space. PASSIVE_LEVEL init.

NICSetPower.label: other
NICSetPower.notes: Top-level power state transition dispatcher. Not an EVT_WDF_DEVICE_SET_POWER — called internally from device power IRP handler.

NICRemoveWakeUpPattern.label: other
NICRemoveWakeUpPattern.notes: Removes a single WOL pattern from the list. Internal helper.

NICRemoveAllWakeUpPatterns.label: other
NICRemoveAllWakeUpPatterns.notes: Removes all WOL patterns. Internal helper.

NICConfigureForWakeUp.label: other
NICConfigureForWakeUp.notes: Configures NIC for WOL operation. Internal helper. Note: scanner may extract this function twice (conditional compilation artifact) — only one GT entry.
